arts.ttl: England U21 2-1 Netherlands U21: Harvey Elliott magic sends Youngs Lions into another Euro final
arts.sum: Young Lions through to second successive final and will meet either France or Germany on Saturday

arts.ttl: Post-Match Reaction | England U21 2-1 Netherlands U21
arts.sum: Football-Oranje’s Michael, Abdul and Mike react to the Netherlands U21s semi-final against England at Euro 2025, as well as the Dutch U19s in their own Euros competition. Join in the conversation on YouTube!
